channel.title: rofe33 on Raphael Tannous
channel.description: Recent content in rofe33 on Raphael Tannous

item.title: One-Page Website Menu for Restaurants
item.description: Welcome to One-Page Menu Website For Restaurants, where I specialize in creating a compact single page menu for restaurants.

item.title: Multi-Page Website Menu for Restaurants
item.description: Welcome to Multi-Page Website Menu For Restaurants, where I specialize in creating personalized websites/menu for restaurants. My service is tailored to meet your unique needs, offering a comprehensive solution to establish a strong online presence…

item.title: About
item.description: Hi there! 👋 I’m Raphael Tannous aka rofe33, studying computer science in my second year at university. When I’m not in class, I enjoy exploring new free (as in freedom) and open-source software and learning about open-source tech. I love writing code that’s both simple and safe. Some of them are left dormant on my computer, and the rest are published on github. Feel free to explore my projects. I hope you discover inspiration and something to ignite your motivation, or simply something to captivate your interest.

item.title: CV
item.description: Education Computer Science (Bachelor) 2022 - Present at Islamic University of Lebanon Currently in the second year of the program at IUL. Acquired a comprehensive understanding of core computer science concepts. Developed proficiency in programming languages including HTML, CSS, C++, and SQL. For more information about the university and its program, visit https://iul.edu.lb. Internship Full Stack Developer 2023-09-01 - 2023-09-30 at Premium Golden Data Mastered front-end development skills including HTML, CSS, and Javascript.

item.title: Rofe33
item.description: Welcome to my Design Showcase! 🎨 I’m rofe33, a Computer Science student fueled by creativity. Although my primary focus is on technology, I’m equally passionate about delving into the realms of design and graffiti art. Currently, there’s nothing to display here except for an animated tag. However, I’m excited to announce that I’ll be adding a variety of captivating designs and intriguing graffiti pieces in the near future. So, stay tuned for updates and join me on this artistic journey!
